case_title: TIT KONG HO VS. CRESENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF STATED DURING THE HEARING THAT DEFENDANT HAVE ALREADY PAID/SATISFIED HIS OBLIGATION. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TIT KONG HO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-15-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRESENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP

REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 22, 2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION TO CRESENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
